message:
fix: add DOLT_COMMIT after tx.Commit in AddDependency/RemoveDependency (bd-2avi)

AddDependency and RemoveDependency used raw s.db.BeginTx + tx.Commit()
but did not call DOLT_COMMIT afterwards. This meant dependency changes
persisted in the working set but were not recorded in Dolt version
history (dolt log, time-travel queries). They only became versioned when
a later operation happened to call DOLT_COMMIT.

Add explicit DOLT_COMMIT calls after tx.Commit() in all three code paths
(add, update metadata, remove), matching the pattern from RunInTransaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
